OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-23-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY FREDERICK F CAMPAGNOLI. HEARING SET FOR JUL-28-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CIRCOSTA IRON & METAL CO., INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INLAND EMPIRE METALS, INC. $21,278.53 PRINCIPAL, $247.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $129.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,654.53
